P0 Protect: SOI Up + Spend Up — Deep Dive

Accounts: CENTURY_GAMES, Wedobest (Screw Sort Puzzle), Luckymoney, AVIAGAMES, 37GAMES
Period: Benchmark (Dec 25-31, 2025) → Mar 1-13, 2026
Criteria: Both avg daily spend AND SOI increased in March vs Benchmark
SOI: Account/app level = naive sum(Moloco) / sum(all installs). Multi-account = spend-weighted.

Contents
  1. CENTURY_GAMES
  2. Wedobest (Screw Sort Puzzle)
  3. Luckymoney
  4. AVIAGAMES
  5. 37GAMES
